modules.name: control-plane
invariants: must keep strict mode and control-plane routing consistent

modules.name: data-plane
invariants: must preserve transfer semantics and fallback behavior unless task explicitly changes them
must keep transfer-id and range semantics observable

modules.name: ops-and-runtime
invariants: runtime fact source must remain authoritative

modules.name: agent-layer
invariants: task card schema must remain machine-readable
gate results must remain JSON + Markdown
Linux and Windows entrypoints must stay behaviorally aligned
